data.description:

Kumar brings extensive experience in corporate strategy, mergers and acquisitions, and capital markets, which is expected to enhance Panther’s North American exploration portfolio and strengthen its corporate growth strategy.

data.title: Ocugen Faces Merger Termination with Carisma Therapeutics
data.description:
An update from Ocugen ( (OCGN) ) is now available.

On June 22, 2025, Ocugen and its subsidiary OrthoCellix entered into a merger agreement with Carisma Therapeutics and its subsidiary. However, on September 16, 2025, Carisma terminated the merger due to Ocugen’s failure to secure $25 million in investments, attributed to poor market conditions and a tight Nasdaq compliance deadline. Ocugen plans to continue focusing on gene therapies and exploring alternatives beneficial for its shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (OCGN) stock is a Hold with a $1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ocugen stock, see the OCGN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on OCGN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, OCGN is a Neutral.

Ocugen’s stock score is primarily influenced by its strong technical momentum, despite significant financial challenges and valuation concerns. The earnings call provided positive clinical updates and strategic partnerships, but financial risks persist.

To see Spark’s full report on OCGN stock, click here.

More about Ocugen

Ocugen, Inc. operates in the biotechnology industry, focusing on gene therapies and regenerative cell therapy platforms. The company is involved in developing products like NeoCart® technology for treating knee articular cartilage defects.

Average Trading Volume: 4,220,728

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $412.2M

data.title: Galaxy Payroll Group Granted Additional Time by Nasdaq to Regain Compliance
data.description:
Galaxy Payroll Group Limited ( (GLXG) ) just unveiled an update.

On September 16, 2025, Galaxy Payroll Group Limited announced that it received an additional 180-day period from Nasdaq to regain compliance with the minimum bid price requirement, extending the deadline to March 16, 2026. This extension follows an initial notice in March 2025 when the company’s shares fell below $1.00 for 30 consecutive business days. The company plans to address this issue, potentially through a reverse stock split, and remains committed to meeting all other Nasdaq listing requirements, thereby maintaining its market position and focusing on enhancing shareholder value.

More about Galaxy Payroll Group Limited

Galaxy Payroll Group Limited is a leading payroll outsourcing service provider based in Hong Kong, specializing in delivering HR and payroll solutions to multinational companies across various industries. The company operates in Hong Kong, Taiwan, Macau, and the PRC, offering payroll outsourcing, employment services, and consultancy to businesses of all sizes.

Average Trading Volume: 52,003

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $13.36M

data.title: Neuralbase AI Announces 5-for-1 Stock Split
data.description:
Neuralbase AI ( (NBBI) ) has provided an update.

On August 5, 2025, Neuralbase AI‘s Board of Directors approved the cancellation of 24,000,000 shares, which was completed on September 3, 2025. This action adjusted the company’s share structure to 44,790,183 common shares, 5,003,773 Series A Preferred shares, and 3,500,000 Series B Preferred shares. Subsequently, on September 9, 2025, the Board approved a 5-for-1 forward stock split for its common stock, effective for shareholders of record on September 30, 2025. This move aims to enhance liquidity and marketability of the stock, with trading on a split-adjusted basis commencing after FINRA’s approval.

More about Neuralbase AI

Average Trading Volume: 126,131

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $275M

data.title: Excalibur Metals Expands Exploration with Bellehelen Project Acquisition
data.description:
Excalibur Metals Corp. ( (TSE:EXCL) ) has issued an announcement.

Excalibur Metals Corp. has announced further details about its Bellehelen Silver-Gold Project located in the Walker Lane Trend of Nevada. The company has signed a definitive agreement with Silver Range Resources to purchase 100% of the project, which spans over 7 kilometers and is considered a priority exploration target due to its promising geology and location in a prolific mining district. The project area includes 90 Federal Lode Claims and is surrounded by major deposits such as the Round Mountain Mine and the Tonopah Silver District. Historical data indicates significant mineralization, and upcoming exploration programs will focus on mapping, surveys, trenching, and drilling to potentially expand known zones and define new discoveries.

More about Excalibur Metals Corp.

Excalibur Metals Corp. is a Canadian company specializing in the exploration of precious metals within established mining regions in the Western United States. The company has secured an option to acquire 100% of the Bellehelen Project in Nye County, Central Nevada, an area with a rich history of gold and silver mining dating back to the early 1900s. Excalibur is listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the symbol ‘EXCL’.

Average Trading Volume: 92,201

For an in-depth examination of EXCL stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.description:

Puma Alpha VCT Plc has announced a further allotment of 1,066,185 ordinary shares as part of its subscription offer, aiming to raise up to £15 million, with an additional over-allotment facility of £5 million. data.title: Gateley Announces Internal Share Transfer by Strategic Board Member
data.description:
Gateley (Holdings) ( (GB:GTLY) ) has issued an update.

Gateley (Holdings) Plc announced a significant share transaction involving Callum Nuttall, a member of its strategic board, who transferred 1,027,000 ordinary shares to his wife, Caroline Martine Annabel Nuttall, without consideration. This transaction, conducted on the London Stock Exchange, reduces Callum Nuttall’s beneficial interest in the company to 567,045 ordinary shares, representing 0.42% of the company’s issued share capital. This internal share transfer reflects personal financial management decisions and does not directly impact the company’s operations or market positioning.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:GTLY) stock is a Hold with a £134.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Gateley (Holdings) stock, see the GB:GTLY Stock Forecast page.

data.title: IRC Limited Completes Disposal of Joint Venture Equity
data.description:
An announcement from IRC ( (HK:1029) ) is now available.

IRC Limited has completed the disposal of its 46% equity interest in Heilongjiang Jianlong Vanadium Industries Co., Ltd, a joint venture company. The transaction, valued at approximately RMB32.2 million (US$4.5 million), marks IRC’s exit from this joint venture, potentially impacting its strategic positioning and financial portfolio.
